subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Tirandaz is intimate and in harmony with Thy mysteries, and in servitude at Thy sacred Threshold with this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار تیرانداز با راز تو همدم و دمساز و در بندگی آستان مقدس با اینعبد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for parents, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for forgiveness
